title: Issue-specific information releases - Ministry of Education
content:
Ngā tukunga pārongo e hāngai pū ana ki ētahi take

## Issue-specific information releases
Find out about the topics we have released packages of information about, where there is a high degree of public interest.
- Legal and compliance 1
- Policies and regulations 1
- Ngā raihana hautū Driver licences Below is a list of papers that the Ministry of Education produced in relation to expanding access to driver licences for students.
Below is a list of papers that the Ministry of Education produced in relation to expanding access to driver licences for students.
- Mahere Rautaki mō te ako kōhungahunga i ngā tau 10 Early learning 10-year Strategic Plan A new strategic plan is being developed for early learning that will set the high-level direction and vision for the next 10 years.
A new strategic plan is being developed for early learning that will set the high-level direction and vision for the next 10 years.
- Te arotake i ngā waeture ako tōmua Early learning regulatory review Learn about our early learning regulatory work programme and how it fits with the Ministry for Regulation’s early childhood education (ECE) regulatory sector review.
Learn about our early learning regulatory work programme and how it fits with the Ministry for Regulation’s early childhood education (ECE) regulatory sector review.
- Te Pire Menemana i te Mātauranga me te Whakapakari (te Whakahou Pūnaha) Education and Training (System Reform) Amendment Bill Find out about the Education and Training (System Reform) Amendment Bill, which passed its Second Reading on 14 May 2026.
Find out about the Education and Training (System Reform) Amendment Bill, which passed its Second Reading on 14 May 2026.
- Education and Training Amendment Act 2025 In November 2025, the Government updated the Education and Training Act 2020 (the Act) to make several changes in schools and tertiary education.
In November 2025, the Government updated the Education and Training Act 2020 (the Act) to make several changes in schools and tertiary education.
- Education and Training Amendment Bill (No 3) Education and Training Amendment Bill (No 3) On 10 August 2024, the Regulatory Systems (Education) Amendment Act 2024 became law.
On 10 August 2024, the Regulatory Systems (Education) Amendment Act 2024 became law.
- Te Hōtaka Mahi mō te Kōpaki Mātauranga 2021 Education Portfolio Work Programme 2021 In March 2021, the Cabinet agreed to the contents of the Education Work Programme (EWP) 2021 for this term of Government.
In March 2021, the Cabinet agreed to the contents of the Education Work Programme (EWP) 2021 for this term of Government.
- Kuputohu Tautika Equity Index Since January 2023, we have removed the school decile system as a means of distributing funding.
Since January 2023, we have removed the school decile system as a means of distributing funding.
- Te tāke mō te Mātauranga Hoko Whakawaho Export Education Levy The Export Education Levy (EEL) is collected from providers that enrol international students.
The Export Education Levy (EEL) is collected from providers that enrol international students.
- Ko te manawhiri kōrero i ngā whare wānanga Freedom of expression in universities These Ministry of Education documents were produced during the development of policy to strengthen academic freedom and freedom of expression in universities.
These Ministry of Education documents were produced during the development of policy to strengthen academic freedom and freedom of expression in universities.
- Te whakawhanake i te mātauranga aratuku Māori Growing Māori medium education Associate Education Minister (Māori Education) Hon Kelvin Davis has received Cabinet approval to develop a work programme to grow Māori medium and kaupapa Māori education.
Associate Education Minister (Māori Education) Hon Kelvin Davis has received Cabinet approval to develop a work programme to grow Māori medium and kaupapa Māori education.
- Te kai manawa ora me te taiora i ngā kura Healthy food and nutrition in schools From April to June 2022, we ran a public consultation on proposed changes to the promotion and provision of healthy drinks in schools.
From April to June 2022, we ran a public consultation on proposed changes to the promotion and provision of healthy drinks in schools.
